titles.title: Civil Preparedness for Agroterrorism Exercise Act of 2026
Civil Preparedness for Agroterrorism Exercise Act of 2026
To require the Department of Homeland Security to conduct an exercise related to agroterrorism, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Homeland Security.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported by the Yeas and Nays: 30 - 0.
